meanings.definition: determine one's position with reference to another point
examples: We had to orient ourselves in the forest
Orient the house towards the West

meanings.definition: familiarize (someone) with new surroundings or circumstances
examples: The dean of students tries to orient the freshmen

meanings.definition: adjust to a specific need or market
examples: a magazine oriented towards young people
tailor your needs to your surroundings

meanings.definition: positioning with respect to a reference system or determining your bearings physically or intellectually
examples: noticed the bee's momentary orienting pause before heading back to the hive
an orienting program for new employees
